overall.description: First-person game engine footage showing a character swimming in coastal waters during golden hour. The view shows hands at the bottom of the frame as the character moves from shallow rocky shoreline into deeper open water, with a vignette mask effect suggesting goggle or diving mask perspective.

agents.ego_description: wading into shallow coastal water along a rocky shoreline on the right

entered.detail: tan and brown rocky coastline formation extending along the right side
tranquil water surface stretching to the horizon with gentle ripples
bright golden reflection of the sun on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view of wading in shallow coastal waters during golden hour. A rocky cliff face dominates the right side while the calm sea stretches ahead toward the horizon, with bright sun glare reflecting off the water surface.

events.description: transition from wading to swimming as water depth increases and swimming strokes become visible
rocky shoreline recedes from view as swimmer moves further into open water

agents.ego_description: swimming forward into deeper water with visible hand movements at the bottom of the frame

entered.detail: dark rock formations visible beneath the clear water surface

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from wading to swimming as the water deepens, with hands now visible performing swimming strokes. Submerged rock formations become visible beneath the surface, while the rocky shoreline gradually recedes into the distance leaving only open water ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a shallow rocky shoreline into the depths of an open coastal sea during the golden hour. It begins with the camera wading through shallow waters beside a dominating rocky cliff face, with bright sun glare reflecting off the calm surface. As the water deepens, the perspective shifts from wading to swimming, bringing the character's hands into view as they perform rhythmic strokes. The scene then expands as the rocky shoreline gradually recedes into the distance, revealing submerged rock formations beneath the surface before the view opens entirely to the vast, shimmering water ahead.
